funFacts: The Manatee swimming in Warm River must resurface for air every three to five minutes, breathing through nostrils located on top of its snout.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using fine-tip gel pens.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about natural botany and organic patterns while developing fine motor coordination.
